from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql import types as T

EXTRACT = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT"
CASE_NOTES_FILE = f"{EXTRACT}/Horizon_CaseNotes.csv"

string_cols = [c for c, t in case_notes.dtypes if t == "string"]

case_notes_clean = case_notes
for c in string_cols:
    case_notes_clean = case_notes_clean.withColumn(
        c,
        F.when(F.col(c).isNull(), None)
         .otherwise(F.regexp_replace(F.col(c), r"[\r\n]+", " "))
    )

display(case_notes_clean)

case_notes_mapped = (
    case_notes_clean
    .withColumn("Title_trim", F.trim(F.col("Title")))
    .withColumn("Desc_trim", F.trim(F.col("Description")))
    .withColumn(
        "noteText",
        F.when(F.col("Desc_trim").isNull() | (F.col("Desc_trim") == ""), F.col("Title_trim"))
         .when(F.col("Title_trim").isNull() | (F.col("Title_trim") == ""), F.col("Desc_trim"))
         .otherwise(F.concat_ws(" - ", F.col("Title_trim"), F.col("Desc_trim")))
    )
    .drop("Title_trim", "Desc_trim")
    .withColumn("noteSource", F.lit("sticky-note"))
)

display(case_notes_mapped)

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, trim

case_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/case-merged-sample-row/"

case_df = (
    spark.read.format("csv")
    .option("header", "true")
    .option("sep", "|")
    .option("multiLine", "true")
    .option("quote", "\"")
    .option("escape", "\\")
    .option("mode", "PERMISSIVE")
    .option("columnNameOfCorruptRecord", "_corrupt_record")
    .load(case_path)
)

filtered_df = (
    case_df.select(
        "importantInformation",
        "caseNodeId",
        "caseReference",
        "caseCreateDate",
        "CaseCloseDate",
        "caseOwnerId"
    )
    .filter(
        trim(col("importantInformation")).isNotNull() &
        (trim(col("importantInformation")) != "")
    )
)

display(filtered_df)

workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == "pins-synw-odw-prod-uks":
    server = "pins-sql-peas-primary-training.database.windows.net"
    database = "pins-sqldb-peas-training"
    akv_name = "pinskvsynwodwproduks"

elif workspace == "pins-synw-odw-dev-uks":
    server = "pins-sql-peas-primary-dev.database.windows.net"
    database = "pins-sqldb-peas-dev"
    akv_name = "pinskvsynwodwdevuks"

else:
    raise ValueError(f"Unknown workspace '{workspace}'")

url = (
    f"jdbc:sqlserver://{server}:1433;"
    f"database={database};"
    "encrypt=true;"
    "trustServerCertificate=false;"
    "hostNameInCertificate=*.database.windows.net;"
    "loginTimeout=30;"
)

user = "peas_app_ZXzkE0vP"

password = mssparkutils.credentials.getSecret(
    akv_name,
    "mpesc-sql-password"
)

user_df = (
    spark.read
    .format("jdbc")
    .option("url", url)
    .option("dbtable", "dbo.[User]")
    .option("user", user)
    .option("password", password)
    .load()
    .select("legacyId", "idpUserId")
)

user_clean = (
    user_df
    .filter(
        (F.col("legacyId").isNotNull()) &
        (F.col("legacyId") != "undefined")
    )
    .select(
        F.col("legacyId").cast("string").alias("legacyId_str"),
        F.col("idpUserId")
    )
)

display(user_clean.limit(20))

important_owner_map = (
    user_clean
    .select(
        F.col("legacyId_str").alias("caseOwnerId_str"),
        F.col("idpUserId").alias("authorId")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["caseOwnerId_str"])
)

important_notes = (
    filtered_df
    .withColumn("caseOwnerId_str", F.col("caseOwnerId").cast("string"))
    .join(important_owner_map, on="caseOwnerId_str", how="left")
    .select(
        F.col("caseNodeId").cast("string").alias("CaseId"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("CaseCloseDate"), F.col("caseCreateDate")).alias("noteDate"),
        F.col("authorId"),  # stays null if not matched
        F.col("importantInformation").alias("noteText"),
        F.lit("important-info").alias("noteSource"),
        F.lit("legacyNote").alias("noteType")
    )
    .filter(
        F.trim(F.col("noteText")).isNotNull() &
        (F.trim(F.col("noteText")) != "")
    )
)

display(important_notes)

csv_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/Event_95506"

event_raw = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("sep", "|")
        .option("multiLine", "true")
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .option("inferSchema", "true")
        .load(csv_path)
)

display(event_raw)
print("Event columns:", len(event_raw.columns))
print(event_raw.columns)

if len(event_raw.columns) <= 13:
    raise ValueError(f"Event_95506 has only {len(event_raw.columns)} columns, can't select [0],[7],[13].")

event_sel = event_raw.select(
    event_raw.columns[0],   # case id (legacy)
    event_raw.columns[7],   # case allocation note
    event_raw.columns[13]   # start date
)

display(event_sel)

event_notes = (
    event_sel
    .select(
        F.col(event_sel.columns[0]).cast("string").alias("CaseId"),
        F.col(event_sel.columns[2]).alias("noteDate"),
        F.col(event_sel.columns[1]).cast("string").alias("noteText"),
        F.lit("case-note").alias("noteSource"),
        F.lit("case-note").alias("noteType")
    )
    .filter(F.trim(F.col("noteText")).isNotNull() & (F.trim(F.col("noteText")) != ""))
)

display(event_notes)
print("event_notes rows:", event_notes.count())

case_notes_combined = (
    case_notes_mapped
    .unionByName(important_notes, allowMissingColumns=True)
    .unionByName(event_notes, allowMissingColumns=True)
)

case_notes_combined = case_notes_combined.dropDuplicates(
    ["CaseId", "noteText", "noteSource"]
)

display(case_notes_combined)

cases_path = f"{mpesc_base_path}/config/Cases/Cases.csv"

cases_df = (
    spark.read
        .format("csv")
        .option("header", "true")
        .option("multiLine", "true")
        .option("escape", "\"")
        .load(cases_path)
)

case_ids = (
    cases_df
    .select(F.col("Case ID").cast("string"))
    .dropna()
    .distinct()
    .rdd.flatMap(lambda x: x)
    .collect()
)

case_notes_filtered = case_notes_combined.filter(F.col("CaseId").isin(case_ids))

display(case_notes_filtered)
print("rows after filter:", case_notes_filtered.count())

case_notes_filtered = (
    case_notes_filtered
    .withColumn("CaseId_str", F.col("CaseId").cast("string"))
    .join(
        cases_df
        .select(
            F.col("Case ID").cast("string").alias("CaseId_str"),
            F.col("GUID").alias("caseIdGuid")
        )
        .dropDuplicates(["CaseId_str"]),
        on="CaseId_str",
        how="left"
    )
    .drop("CaseId_str")
)

display(case_notes_filtered)

# Map createdBy -> idpUserId for sticky notes (and anything else with createdBy)
created_by_map = (
    user_clean
    .select(
        F.col("legacyId_str").alias("createdBy_str"),
        F.col("idpUserId")
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["createdBy_str"])
)

case_notes_filtered = (
    case_notes_filtered
    .withColumn("createdBy_str", F.col("CreatedBy").cast("string"))  # adjust if your column is 'createdBy'
    .join(created_by_map, on="createdBy_str", how="left")
    .withColumn(
        "authorId",
        F.coalesce(F.col("authorId"), F.col("idpUserId"))  # keeps important-info authorId if already set
    )
    .drop("createdBy_str", "idpUserId")
)

display(case_notes_filtered)
